description_long: This is a pair of high-top athletic sneakers featuring a vibrant mix of red, purple, pink, and blue hues. The shoes have a prominent blue swoosh on the side panels, and the upper is constructed from a combination of textured and smooth materials, likely synthetic leather and fabric. The ankle area is reinforced with padded collars and adjustable Velcro straps, each strap displaying text and numbers in blue. The laces are a deep maroon color, threaded through standard eyelets, and the midsole is white with a red outsole. The heel area is slightly raised and padded for comfort, while the overall design suggests a sporty, urban style. Visible stitching and panel overlays add to the structural detail and durability of the shoes.
description: A pair of colorful high-top sneakers with blue swooshes, maroon laces, and Velcro straps, featuring a mix of red, purple, and pink panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing both shoes side by side, highlighting the maroon laces, Velcro straps with text, and the padded tongue and collar.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the blue swoosh, layered panel construction, and the Velcro strap with visible text and number.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the padded red heel collars, blue logo embroidery, and the layered heel construction.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the blue swoosh, Velcro strap with text, and the multi-colored panel overlays.
attribute_logo: blue embroidered logo on the heel and blue text on the Velcro straps
